message.content:
@startuml
actor Customer

box "Shopware Platform" #LightGray
participant Checkout
participant "Asynchronous\nPayment Handler" as APH
end box

box "External System" #LightGray
actor "Payment Platform" as PP
end box

Customer ->o Checkout : pay
Checkout ->o APH : pay
Checkout -->o Customer : redirect
Customer ->o PP : pay
APH <--o PP : redirect
APH ->o APH : finalize

@enduml
